task: The user states a starting budget of $100, then reports two separate expenses across turns ($40 on groceries, $25 on a book), then asks how much remains. The agent must subtract each expense as reported and report the running balance at the end.

conversation_history.content: Got it, your starting budget is $100.
Then I spent $25 on a book.
How much do I have remaining in my budget?

notes: Tests stateful numeric tracking (budget) across four turns and a final balance query.
